title: tabebuia ochracea
intro: Tabebuia ochracea, also known as the Orange Trumpet Tree or Lapacho, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antitumor activities. The health benefits of Tabebuia ochracea include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, which are available in various health food stores and online platforms.
